Jae Woong Hwang Resume Experience Toolchains

Selected Toolchain Project

TOS / ODP MATLAB Simulink Bird-Eye-View Simulator

MATLAB Script / Simulink / Base Workspace / ADAS Debugging

Repeatable simulator for rare commercial-vehicle ADAS edge cases that were hard to reproduce with a real bus.

Public-Safe SimulatorMATLAB GUISimulinkBase Workspace assignin / evalinTo WorkspaceTOS / ODP

Objective

Fine-tune and modify TOS / ODP logic using real driving data, removing the need to physically reproduce the same test situation after every software change.

Outcome

Enabled repeated replay, logic modification, and parameter tuning. The tool helped reduce bus-lane false target selection during SCC operation and supported final real-vehicle confirmation.

System Architecture

Click MATLAB app, Base Workspace, Simulink model, signal manager, update scripts, and To Workspace blocks for detailed explanations.

Source Components Preserved From Original Page

ComponentRole
DrawData_GUI.mMain GUI for loading logs, replaying driving data, and visualizing TOS/ODP behavior.
SignalManager_GUI.mSignal-editing window for ODP/TOS signal definitions and simulation mappings.
TOSODP_Simulation_Variables_UI.mRegisters ODP/TOS simulation variables into Base Workspace using assignin.
UpdateODPModel_GUI.m / UpdateTOSModel_GUI.mModel update pipeline for inserting simulation signal hooks into ODP/TOS Simulink models.
Custom OverlayVisualization hook called per replay frame for custom overlays.

Portfolio Positioning

  • This is a bottleneck-removal tool, not just a MATLAB visualization project.
  • It proves practical systems thinking: reproduce rare field issues, debug logic faster, and reduce expensive vehicle-test loops.
